example: He visited the barber every month for a trim and a clean shave.
The butcher carefully trimmed the beef to remove excess fat.
The builder constructed a new housing development on the outskirts of town.
The firefighter bravely entered the burning building to rescue trapped occupants.
The mailman delivers letters and packages to our doorstep every morning.
The gardener planted a variety of flowers to create a colorful garden.
She hired a guard to watch over her estate while she was away on vacation.
My uncle is a skilled tailor who runs his own shop.
The sailor's job involves handling ropes and rigging.
She's a talented photographer who specializes in wildlife photography.
She hired a babysitter to watch her kids while she went out for dinner.
The celebrity's bodyguard always accompanies them to public events.
She fulfilled her childhood dream of becoming an astronaut and traveled to the International Space Station.
She hired a real estate agent to help her find a new house.
The reporter interviewed witnesses at the scene of the accident.
The servant prepared breakfast and tidied up the house before the family woke up.
Mary decided to become a housewife after the birth of her first child to focus on raising her family.
The freelancer sets her own schedule and chooses which projects to take on.
The judge listened to both sides of the case before making a ruling.
The president of the company announced a new expansion plan during the shareholders' meeting.
She sought the advice of a financial adviser to help plan her retirement.
She's the director of marketing at the company, responsible for advertising and promotions.
She works as a freelance translator, translating documents from English to Spanish.
He's a dedicated sportsman who excels in both soccer and basketball.
The editor reviewed the articles submitted by journalists before publication.
She hired a math tutor to help her daughter improve her grades.
He works as a stock trader, buying and selling shares on behalf of clients.
He's an automotive technician, specializing in diagnosing and repairing engine problems.
She's a skilled programmer who develops mobile applications for smartphones.
She's been working as a flight attendant for ten years, enjoying the opportunity to travel.
She's been working as a veterinarian at a local animal clinic for over twenty years.
She's the secretary for the CEO, managing his schedule and handling correspondence.
As a chemist, he always wore safety goggles.
